findings.title: Test file contains hardcoded credential
findings.description: A hardcoded credential found in a test file (not....oken). This is unlikely to be a production secret, but test values should still use env vars for consistency.
findings.recommendation: Consider using environment variables or test helpers to generate test credentials.
